name: Tofu Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 Serrano chilies, stemmed and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a pot, mix the palm sugar, white vinegar, water, salt, and serrano chilies.
2. Bring the mixture to a slow boil over moderate heat.
3. Cook, uncovered, until the mixture thickens slightly, about 15 minutes.
4. When ready to serve, pour the mixture into a small serving bowl.
5. Garnish with ground peanuts and chopped cilantro.
6. Store any leftovers without the garnish in a sealed jar; it will keep for up to 2 months in the refrigerator.
